title: Hiring Medical Officer at Symbiosis Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Symbiosis Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Symbiosis Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Symbiosis Hospital:
Symbiosis Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Symbiosis Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
